title: suggest --requirement error messages: format example + launcher flag
desc: When --requirement has bad format or contains launcher flags, error messages now show correct format examples. CommandHelpMap suggest entry includes REQUIREMENTS section so --help always shows the format.
steps: Missing => separator: error shows 'Correct format: --requirement wkappbot <cmd> <args> => <expected result>'
Launcher flag (--sudo) in requirement cmd: error says 'launcher flag, strip it' + shows corrected example
wkappbot suggest --help: REQUIREMENTS section shows format, NOTE about launcher flags

requirements.expect: error message shows Correct format example
ok' => error explains launcher flag must be stripped
error message shows correct format example: wkappbot <cmd> <args> => <expected result>
error explains that --sudo is a launcher flag and must be omitted from requirement cmd

author: claude
